pi_items.source: Official O*NET SOC code for Aerospace Engineers (https://www.onetonline.org/link/summary/17-2011.00)
Collins Aerospace is a real aerospace and defense company part of RTX (https://www.linkedin.com/company/collins-aerospace/)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves formatting a synthetic Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document for the fictional FMS-4000 Flight Management System according to IEEE 29148-2018 standards. The document is seeded from fms_requirements_raw.docx which contains 18 Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM-001 through RTM-018) entries and properly structured Collins Aerospace proprietary documentation with realistic regulatory references (FAR Part 25, EASA CS-25). All metadata occupational classifications are verified: Aerospace Engineer is O*NET SOC 17-2011.00, working in Aerospace Product and Parts Manufacturing (NAICS 33641) at Collins Aerospace, a legitimate aerospace and defense contractor that is part of RTX Corporation.
